auth.loginRequiredMessage: Please log in to access the admin panel
auth.noAdminAccessMessage: Your account does not have the necessary permissions to access the administration area. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.

fields.name: Name
fields.unitReferencePlaceholder: Select a unit, e.g. piece, pkg, kg
fields.currencyPlaceholder: Select a currency, e.g. USD, EUR
fields.isoKeyPlaceholder: Select a country, e.g. DE, AT, CH

messages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
messages.confirmDeleteMultiple: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} items?
messages.fieldRequiredValidNumber: Field is required and must be a valid number
messages.idCannotBeChanged: Identifier cannot be changed in edit mode.
messages.measureOptional: Optional. Type of measurement (e.g., length, mass, volume).
messages.baseUnitOptional: Optional. Reference to base unit symbol.
messages.factorOptional: Optional. Conversion factor to the base unit.
messages.factorInvalid: Factor must be a valid number.
messages.idInvalidPattern: Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (e.g., de-vat-full).
messages.taxRateMinValue: Tax rate must be at least 0.
messages.taxRateMaxValue: Tax rate must be at most 100.
messages.countryReference: Optional. Reference to a country (ISO Alpha-2 key).
messages.validFrom: Optional. Start date and time when this price is valid.
messages.validTo: Optional. End date and time when this price is valid.
messages.isoKey: ISO key consisting of 2 lowercase letters (e.g., en, de, fr).
messages.activeLanguages: Only active languages are shown in the session configuration and REST API.
messages.mandatoryLanguages: Mandatory languages must be provided in all language input fields.
messages.mandatoryLanguagesAndInactiveLanguages: Mandatory languages are required. Inactive languages (greyed out) are shown but cannot be edited.
messages.groupRefs: Optional. References to groups for group-specific pricing.
messages.channelRefs: Optional. References to channels for channel-specific pricing.
